purpose: r14 training config — consumed by pod-side LoRA trainer when r14 corpus is ready. Mirrors config/alm_r13_v2_config.json shape; inherits lora rank policy from config/lora_rank_per_path.json.
status: SKELETON — training kickoff gated by experiments/alm_r14/corpus_alm_r14_v1.jsonl completion + g8 PASS

training.per_path_lora_config: config/lora_rank_per_path.json (inherited without change from r13; same rank/alpha/target_modules per path)
training._cpgd_note: cert-projected gradient dance — each step gate-checks AN11 triple admissibility; reject step if chain breaks

vram_mode.p4: qlora-nf4 (31B on 80GB H100 with 4-bit base + bf16 LoRA adapter)

phi_substrate_gate.method: gram spectrum + participation ratio + null-bootstrap p95
phi_substrate_gate._r14_delta: prompt set MUST include Korean-axis 8/16 prompts (was pure English in r13 cross)

unlocks: #82 Mk.XII 70B retrain (r14 corpus → trained ckpt → Mk.XII data_loader wire per docs/mk_xii_scale_plan.md:160)
open_decisions: max_steps 300 vs 500 (r13 v2 used 300; r14 has +43% content so 400 may be warranted)
learning_rate 2e-4 keep vs 1.5e-4 (conservative given Korean tokens are lower-frequency)
cpgd_active true vs false (true = cert chain gated per step; false = free-run)
